/tmp/codeql-scratch-e8c90cb33cf4ca9f/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/zlib_example64.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/zlib_example64.dir/example.c.o -o zlib_example64  -Wl,-rpath,/home/runner/work/test-aw1/test-aw1/zlib-develop/zlib-develop/_codeql_build_dir ../libz.so.1.3.2.1
